message:
feat(analytics): tabbed breakdowns view with 4 dimensions (2noh9.4.18.6)

Add BreakdownTab enum (Agent/Workspace/Source/Model) to the analytics
Breakdowns view with tab-bar navigation, side-by-side bar charts for
tokens and messages per dimension, color-coded labels, and drilldown
via Enter. Tab/Shift+Tab cycles sub-tabs; Up/Down navigates rows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
